body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Granny worker registry availability + CC.0 dispatch
body.description:
**What changed:** Granny now dispatches CC.0 via tmux send-keys when available (semaphore gates + usage limit + no in_progress); config-driven worker rules from granny.yaml; availability semaphore protocol replaces hardcoded checks.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
- Dispatch race condition: ticket marked in_progress but send-keys fails (tmux offline)
- Silent semaphore ignore: CC.0.available.false ignored if file permissions wrong
- Usage cache stale: _get_usage_pct() reads cached value; CC could exceed 70% in between cache updates
- DickSimnel device spawn before wiring complete: T-dicksimnel-device in_progress but dispatch_fn not yet integrated

**Signals to watch:**
- "tmux send-keys failed" at INFO level — send-keys not reaching claude-main
- GRANNY_CC0_OFFER posted but /sprint-ticket never received by CC (check CC.0 mailbox)
- CC.0.available.false created but tickets still offered (gate evaluation bug)
- Usage cache age > 5 min with CC usage climbing (indicates timing issue)
- DickSimnel dispatch attempted before T-dicksimnel-device closes (incomplete gate chain)

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-16 or when both T-dicksimnel-device closes AND first CC.0 dispatch occurs.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only

**Design rules:** none apply

**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close

**Completion criteria:** no automated verification — observation ticket; done when predicted effects are annotated as occurred / clear / partial and ticket is closed
